description: CompositionOrange round neck top made of 100% cotton, has ruffle sleeves, a rosette attachment on the chest and bead and print detail on the frontFitRegularWash careMachine wash in cold water with like colours in a gentle cycleDo not bleach or wringTumble dry low or lay flat to dryMedium heat steam iron; do not iron on decorationsDo not dry in sunlightFresh from doodle's range of tops, myntra stocks the prettiest ones for your little one. Prettily suited for her whimsical taste, this piece looks good paired with denim skirts or capris.
